text: I am the Evolution Scholar of Lucidiah. Bring me beast relics and I shall evolve them.
I can evolve Lunar Tiger into Celestial Griffin.
I can evolve Celestial Griffin into Lunar Phoenix.
I can evolve Ancient Wolf into Thunder Griffin.
I can evolve Thunder Griffin into Shadow Golem.
I can evolve Ancient Basilisk into Mystic Titan.
I can evolve Mystic Titan into Thunder Minotaur.
I can evolve Thunder Drake into Ancient Griffin.
I can evolve Ancient Griffin into Void Tiger.
I can evolve Storm Golem into Thunder Specter.
I can evolve Thunder Specter into Celestial Golem.
I can evolve Shadow Serpent into Ancient Tiger.
I can evolve Ancient Tiger into Shadow Cyclops.
I can evolve Astral Owlbear into Thunder Djinn.
I can evolve Thunder Djinn into Thunder Drake.
I can evolve Solar Djinn into Solar Specter.
I can evolve Solar Specter into Wild Owlbear.
I can evolve Crystal Hydra into Infernal Serpent.
I can evolve Infernal Serpent into Infernal Djinn.
I can evolve Astral Drake into Lunar Leviathan.
I can evolve Lunar Leviathan into Void Golem.
I can evolve Lunar Titan into Storm Minotaur.
I can evolve Storm Minotaur into Frozen Specter.
I can evolve Arcane Griffin into Arcane Wyvern.
I can evolve Arcane Wyvern into Void Chimera.
I can evolve Shadow Phoenix into Lunar Wolf.
I can evolve Lunar Wolf into Infernal Wyvern.
I can evolve Frozen Phoenix into Storm Minotaur.
I can evolve Storm Minotaur into Arcane Leviathan.
I can evolve Arcane Cyclops into Crystal Manticore.
I can evolve Crystal Manticore into Lunar Golem.
I can evolve Thunder Basilisk into Wild Kraken.
I can evolve Wild Kraken into Astral Owlbear.
I can evolve Storm Minotaur into Wild Tiger.
I can evolve Wild Tiger into Celestial Leviathan.
I can evolve Celestial Wolf into Arcane Leviathan.
I can evolve Arcane Leviathan into Frozen Chimera.
I can evolve Ancient Kraken into Mystic Chimera.
I can evolve Mystic Chimera into Ancient Wolf.
I can evolve Ancient Manticore into Solar Wyvern.
I can evolve Solar Wyvern into Arcane Drake.
I can evolve Arcane Drake into Mystic Titan.
I can evolve Mystic Titan into Crystal Owlbear.
I can evolve Arcane Manticore into Frozen Owlbear.
I can evolve Frozen Owlbear into Thunder Basilisk.
I can evolve Storm Titan into Thunder Cyclops.
I can evolve Thunder Cyclops into Celestial Kraken.
I can evolve Astral Golem into Storm Phoenix.
I can evolve Storm Phoenix into Wild Basilisk.
I can evolve Frozen Griffin into Thunder Golem.
I can evolve Thunder Golem into Thunder Leviathan.
I can evolve Frozen Serpent into Wild Basilisk.
I can evolve Wild Basilisk into Crystal Golem.
I can evolve Mystic Tiger into Crystal Basilisk.
I can evolve Crystal Basilisk into Ancient Specter.
I can evolve Wild Basilisk into Wild Owlbear.
I can evolve Wild Owlbear into Storm Phoenix.
I can evolve Mystic Cyclops into Wild Minotaur.
I can evolve Wild Minotaur into Infernal Wyvern.
I can evolve Crystal Chimera into Solar Griffin.
I can evolve Solar Griffin into Solar Leviathan.
Choose a beast evolution.
